task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS IAM ARN string and returns True if valid, False otherwise. The ARN should follow the format: arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS S3 bucket policy allowing public read access to all objects in the bucket named 'my-public-bucket'
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs, which follow the pattern: i- followed by 17 alphanumeric characters (e.g., i-0a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8)
